char_run.root_cause: Pages with long character runs without spacing (poetry, TOC, index)

low_arabic_ratio.root_cause: Pages with >50% non-Arabic (title pages, copyright, indices)

division_overlap.root_cause: L-010 same-page heading collisions (L-003). Content unaffected.

conclusion: None of the 15,413 validation warnings across 1,892 books are actionable. All represent expected corpus characteristics or documented known limitations.
